_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: Minecraft Java NeoForge
author: M4RC-XX@GitHub
description: NeoForge is a modular, lightweight mod loader for Minecraft

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Minecraft Fabric Installation Script
apt update
apt install -y curl jq unzip dos2unix wget
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

# Enable snapshots
if [ -z "$MC_VERSION" ] || [ "$MC_VERSION" == "latest" ]; then
  MC_VERSION=$(curl -sSL https://meta.fabricmc.net/v2/versions/game | jq -r '.[] | select(.stable== true )|.version' | head -n1)
elif [ "$MC_VERSION" == "snapshot" ]; then
  MC_VERSION=$(curl -sSL https://meta.fabricmc.net/v2/versions/game | jq -r '.[] | select(.stable== false )|.version' | head -n1)
fi

if [ -z "$FABRIC_INSTALLER" ] || [ "$FABRIC_INSTALLER" == "latest" ]; then
  FABRIC_INSTALLER=$(curl -sSL https://meta.fabricmc.net/v2/versions/installer | jq -r '.[0].version')
fi

if [ -z "$LOADER_VERSION" ] || [ "$LOADER_VERSION" == "latest" ]; then
  LOADER_VERSION=$(curl -sSL https://meta.fabricmc.net/v2/versions/loader | jq -r '.[] | select(.stable== true )|.version' | head -n1)
elif [ "$LOADER_VERSION" == "snapshot" ]; then
  LOADER_VERSION=$(curl -sSL https://meta.fabricmc.net/v2/versions/loader | jq -r '.[] | select(.stable== false )|.version' | head -n1)
fi

#wget -O fabric-installer.jar https://maven.fabricmc.net/net/fabricmc/fabric-installer/$FABRIC_INSTALLER/fabric-installer-$FABRIC_INSTALLER.jar
#java -jar fabric-installer.jar server -mcversion $MC_VERSION -loader $LOADER_VERSION -downloadMinecraft

curl -o eula.txt https://raw.githubusercontent.com/M4RC-XX/pelican-eggs/refs/heads/main/minecraft/java/fabric/eula.txt
curl -o server.jar https://meta.fabricmc.net/v2/versions/loader/$MC_VERSION/$LOADER_VERSION/$FABRIC_INSTALLER/server/jar
echo -e "Install Complete"

variables.name: Fabric Installer
variables.description: The version of Fabric to install.

variables.name: Fabric Loader Version
variables.description: The version of Fabric Loader to install.

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description: The version of Minecraft to install. Use "latest" to install the latest version, or use "snapshot" to install the latest snapshot.

variables.name: Server Jar File
variables.description: The name of the server jarfile to run the server with.
